text:
is an artbook by various illustrators of GAINAX published by Kadokawa Shoten on 11 July 2003.

Overview

The book contains a large collection of illustrations produced by various GAINAX artists (Yoshiyuki Sadamoto, Takeshi Honda, Kazuya Tsurumaki, Ikuto Yamashita, Hidenori Matsubara, etc.). The illustrations come from different sources like posters, calendars, magazine covers (Kadokawa Shoten manga, Young Ace, Monthly Newtype, etc.), albums, DVDs, video game covers, phone cards, etc.

A list of authors and sources of illustrations is available at the end of the book. In total, in its original edition, 321 illustrations produced between 1995 and 2003 were offered.

Die Sterne has a new edition, titled Die Sterne Ver. 2.0, released on 18 June 2007 in Japan. It is similar to the original version, but features 75 new illustrations.

Trivia

Die Sterne" means "The Stars" in German.
